subtitle.en: stomatopod eyes carry up to 12 spectral photoreceptor classes plus 4 polarisation types — yet behavioural tests show they don't outperform 3-cone humans at colour discrimination
subtitle.ko: Stomatopod는 12 광수용체 + 4 편광 — 그러나 행동 실험에선 인간보다 색 식별 *나쁨*

description.en: 12 narrow-band Gaussian sensitivities from 310 nm UV to 690 nm red. Highlight slider picks a channel. Counter-intuitive Thoen 2014 result framed as the punchline.
description.ko: 310-690 nm 12 narrow Gaussian 감도. 슬라이더로 채널 강조. Thoen 2014 반직관 결과를 포인트로.
